creator: bugzilla.freebsd@omnilan.de
text:
The config-recursive target doesn't work correctly anymore.
It recurses also dependencies, which were unset/excluded/siwtched off by OPTIONS framework.
Some time ago, OPTIONS worked very well.  No idea why someone changed it and introduced OPTION_ makros, I don't see any benefit anywhere over the previous usage.

I would like to know if this is going to change again in the near future or if it's worth to look at config-recursive: and try to fix.
Meanwhile I'll live with unnecessarily spammed db/ports/ directory, making live harder if one likes to keep overview :-(

-harry
